script: az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query "[?contains(name,'mac') || contains(name,'tunnel') || contains(name,'cloudflared') || contains(name,'ssh') || contains(name,'launchctl') || contains(name,'apple') || contains(name,'remote')].name" -o tsv 2>&1; echo '---'; echo 'All secrets sorted:'; az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query '[].name' -o tsv 2>&1 | sort | grep -iE 'mac|tunnel|cloudflared|ssh|launchctl|apple|remote|bridge|edge'
